overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic urban environment. The player exits a covered underpass, passes the NCPD headquarters building, and continues along a graffiti-covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway structures with moderate pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass transitioning to open street corner

events.description: exits covered overpass area into direct sunlight
turns right at NCPD building corner onto main sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from under the overpass toward the street corner, then turning right

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating covered area
large black and red building with NCPD logo signage
tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and murals

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete highway overpass with limited sky visibility. The player walks forward past a traffic light and exits the covered area into bright daylight. The NCPD building dominates the left side with its distinctive black facade and red accents. At around 8 seconds, the camera turns right onto a main sidewalk, with a graffiti-covered wall now prominent on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city sidewalk with elevated infrastructure

events.description: multiple pedestrians pass by in opposing directions

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing various pedestrians and observing the street traffic

notable_agents.action: child in bright green shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk
pedestrian in white tank top walking along the graffiti wall

entered.detail: curved elevated highway and metal truss walkways overhead
metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open city sidewalk with the graffiti wall on the right and a street with moving traffic on the left. The NCPD building recedes behind as the camera moves forward. Elevated highway structures crisscross overhead. Various pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including a child in a green shirt and adults in casual attire. The scene is bright and exposed to the open sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: long straight urban sidewalk with industrial walls

events.description: cardboard boxes and debris visible scattered along the sidewalk edge

agents.ego_description: continuing down the long straight sidewalk with fewer pedestrians around

entered.detail: discarded cardboard boxes and trash along the base of the graffiti wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down a long, straight sidewalk with the graffiti-covered wall extending on the right. Pedestrian traffic has thinned out significantly. Cardboard debris is scattered along the sidewalk edge. The elevated highway structure has shifted to the left side of the frame as the camera progresses forward. The street remains active with occasional vehicles passing by on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the shadow of a concrete underpass into a bright, exposed urban corridor. It begins beneath a highway overpass with limited sky visibility, moving past a traffic light and exiting into daylight where the black and red facade of the NCPD building dominates the left. As the camera turns right onto a main sidewalk, the scene opens up to reveal a graffiti-covered wall on the right and a street with moving traffic on the left, while elevated highway structures crisscross overhead among passing pedestrians. The perspective then continues forward as the NCPD building recedes and the crowd thins, shifting the overhead highway structures toward the left side of the frame. Finally, the camera progresses down a long, straight stretch of sidewalk where scattered cardboard debris lines the edge of the persistent graffiti wall.
